suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the brainstorming/design-comparison requirement for new public resource families in Exec Mode: either require an explicit `brainstorming` invocation or require a handoff section naming the chosen and rejected API design options, and ensure `followedProcedure` is false when neither happens.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This recommendation still stands from the prior media scrutiny round. Both `images-surface` and `audio-transcription-translation-and-speech` introduced public media families, but their transcript skeletons lacked a `brainstorming` step and their handoffs did not record chosen-vs-rejected design alternatives, while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` still reported true. Review reports: `.factory/validation/media/scrutiny/reviews/images-surface.json` and `.factory/validation/media/scrutiny/reviews/audio-transcription-translation-and-speech.json`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The audio review repeated the same `sdk-surface-worker` brainstorming ambiguity observation already captured from the images review.
Add another shared-type convention note warning against reusing partially overlapping enums across families.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in mission `AGENTS.md` and `.factory/library/architecture.md`, which already say shared types should only be used when truly shared.
